summary: Frontend testing completed for TOC standardization, regex fix, and Word export preview mode. All critical fixes verified working.

regex_fix.description: Regex /<th(?=[\s>])/gi correctly applied in BarristerView.jsx (line 580) and ReportView.jsx (line 900). This prevents corrupting <thead> tags which was causing blank PDF exports.

toc_standardization.description: All 4 export flows use identical TOC format with .toc-container (gray bg #f8fafc), .toc-heading (uppercase 'CONTENTS (X SECTIONS)'), .toc-grid (2-column layout). Verified in: 1) Barrister View - 'Contents (15 Sections)' with 2-column grid, 2) Print All/Word All - 'CONTENTS (5 SECTIONS)' with 2-column grid, 3) Progress tab exports

word_export_preview.description: All Word export buttons now open document-preview page with mode=word instead of downloading .doc file. Verified: 1) Barrister Word -> /document-preview?mode=word, 2) Word All -> /document-preview?mode=word, 3) Progress Word -> /document-preview?mode=word

pdf_export_preview.description: PDF export from Barrister View opens document-preview page with mode=pdf

frontend_compilation.description: Frontend compiles successfully without errors. No Briefcase import issues or duplicate AlertTriangle errors.

exportHtml_css.description: exportHtml.js contains .toc-container, .toc-heading, .toc-grid, .toc-item CSS classes at lines 56-58

context_for_next_testing_agent: All TOC formats are now standardized across Barrister View, ReportView, Print All, and Progress exports. Word exports open document-preview page instead of downloading .doc files. The regex fix /<th(?=[\s>])/gi prevents <thead> tag corruption that was causing blank PDF exports.
